SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-19-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LILY FU CLAFFEE IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. PLAINTIFF SCOTT ADREW CLAFFEE IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT GUIDED SAFARIS, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY GAURAU WALIA VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT INFORMED THAT HE DID NOT FILE A ZOOM REQUEST, DID NOT SUPPLY THE PLAINTIFFS WITH A COPY OF HIS EXHIBITS, DID NOT SUBMIT AN AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR TO THE COURT. NO FUTHER CONTINUANCES. DEFENDANT FILING WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFFS DO NOT NEED TO SUBMIT ANOTHER ZOOM REQUEST. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT PROPER ZOOM REQUEST.
(SC-109) AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR -GARURAV WALIA TO APPEAR ON BEHALF OF GUIDED SAFARIS, INC FILED BY RESPONDENT GUIDED SAFARIS, INC.

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Oct-20-2021 Set For Trial On Oct-20-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 306

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-19-2021 Continued To Oct-20-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-20-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lily Fu Claffee, Scott Claffee - Plaintiffs/Respondents
Gaurav Walia, personal representative for Guided Safaris, Inc. - Defendant/Appellant

Mr. Walia contends the Court lacks jurisdiction as the total claim for both Plaintiffs exceeds the jurisdictional limits of small claims court. Additionally, Mr. Walia claims B&P Code Sec. 17550 provides the sole procedural remedy for travel agent grievances.

The parties are placed under oath.

Plaintiff/Respondent's Exhibit F is retained.
